title: Multi-OMICS approaches in cancer biology: New era in cancer therapy
source: Chakraborty et al., BBA - Molecular Basis of Disease, 2024

L2: Multi-omics frameworks integrate diverse datasets to enhance understanding of cancer molecular mechanisms
Algorithmic approaches enable tumor classification and prognosis through integrated omics data
L3: Review of multi-omics approaches in cancer biology including genomics, transcriptomics, proteomics, and metabolomics integration, examining computational frameworks for tumor classification, biomarker discovery, and personalized therapy development
